plugins.name: claude-code-setting
plugins.description: Claude Code Setting - 管理 Claude Code 设置和 MCP 服务器配置的工具集，提供最佳实践指导以避免上下文污染

plugins.name: wjs-transcribing-audio
plugins.description: Audio/video → timestamped SRT in the source language. Chinese uses Volcano ASR; other languages use OpenAI Whisper with word-level timestamps + punctuation-bounded re-segmentation.

plugins.name: wjs-translating-subtitles
plugins.description: Translate an SRT from one language to another with punctuation-bounded re-segmentation. Simplified Chinese and English are first-class targets. Supports bilingual output.

plugins.name: wjs-dubbing-video
plugins.description: Time-aligned TTS dub of a video against a target-language SRT. Volcano TTS for Chinese, edge-tts for everything else. Single-speaker by default; opt-in visual diarization for multi-speaker.

plugins.name: wjs-burning-subtitles
plugins.description: Final-composite step: burn SRT into pixels via libass, mix in a dub track, keep the original audio as a low-volume bed — all in one ffmpeg encode (no cascade).

plugins.name: wjs-localizing-video
plugins.description: Thin orchestrator for the end-to-end video localization pipeline (transcribe → translate → dub → burn). Use it when the user asks for full localization in one go.

plugins.name: wjs-syncing-multicam
plugins.description: Audio cross-correlation alignment for N recordings of the same event. Outputs `.sync.json` sidecars per file — never re-encodes the originals.

plugins.name: wjs-editing-multicam
plugins.description: Auto-edit 2+ synced cams into a single MP4. Switches between angles second-by-second based on audio energy. Optional picture-in-picture.

plugins.name: wjs-segmenting-video
plugins.description: Cut a long-form interview / lecture / podcast into 3–6 stand-alone topical short clips, with per-clip SRT — ready for downstream post-production.

plugins.name: wjs-overlaying-video
plugins.description: Post-production overlays on top of a clip: AI-generated cover as first frame, HTML/CSS kinetic captions, illustration overlays, chapter chips, end-card CTA. HyperFrames-backed, single final encode.

plugins.name: wjs-reframing-video
plugins.description: Horizontal ↔ vertical conversion (16:9 ↔ 9:16, 4:3 ↔ 3:4). Crops a narrow band and tracks the active speaker via MediaPipe + mouth-aspect-ratio variance.

plugins.name: wjs-uploading-video
plugins.description: Batch upload videos to YouTube with per-video metadata from `UPLOAD_META.md`. Survives SOCKS/HTTP proxies by using `requests` directly for resumable upload.

plugins.name: wjs-converting-text-to-video
plugins.description: Turn a 王建硕-style WeChat article into a narrated 1080×1920 portrait MP4 (30–90s) — Volcano TTS voiceover, HyperFrames CSS/GSAP per-scene animation, subtle SFX, abstract watercolor background.

plugins.name: wjs-teaching-english
plugins.description: Turn a single English word into an HLS supercut lesson from a video base — stitches every clip where the word is spoken, prepended with a bilingual intro card (word + IPA + 中文 gloss + usage, Volcano TTS) and a follow-me CTA card.

plugins.name: wjs-publishing-wechat
plugins.description: Polish a 微信公众号 (WeChat Official Account) article, generate a cover image (题图) and explanation illustration, and upload as a draft to mp.weixin.qq.com.

plugins.name: wjs-mining-articles
plugins.description: Mine a video's SRT — a monologue / 讲解, or an interview where 王建硕 is one speaker — into multiple standalone 微信公众号 articles, one per distinct topic.

plugins.name: wjs-mining-voicedrop
plugins.description: Turn uploaded VoiceDrop voice memos (the jianshuo.dev/files R2 inbox) into WeChat article drafts — pull the unprocessed recordings, transcribe, and mine articles from each.

plugins.name: wjs-distilling-style
plugins.description: Capture a writer's voice from a few sample articles and rewrite text to sound like that author. Works for any author, 王建硕 included.

plugins.name: wjs-syndicating-articles
plugins.description: Auto-syndicate your newest 微信公众号 article across platforms — auto-posts to X / Bluesky / Threads / LinkedIn and prepares a copy-paste outbox for manual platforms (Facebook / 小红书 / 即刻 / 知乎).

plugins.name: wjs-tweeting-from-articles
plugins.description: Post a daily X tweet inspired by your newest un-tweeted WeChat article — drafts 3 angle variants (quote / metaphor / one-liner), posts the chosen one via xurl, records history.

plugins.name: wjs-x-improving-content
plugins.description: Systematically improve X content by A/B-testing the tweet-generation prompt — git-SHA-versioned, numbered experiments judged on median impressions per tweet, with per-tweet feature mining.

plugins.name: wjs-x-increasing-follower
plugins.description: Grow X followers via numbered, A/B-testable growth experiments — each with a hypothesis, target metric, rollback state, and verdict. North-star = new-follower ÷ profile-visit conversion.

plugins.name: wjs-polishing-x-engagement
plugins.description: Rewrite a plain Chinese tweet into a high-engagement version backed by real facts + an interaction hook. Returns 2–3 variants, short / plain / colloquial.

plugins.name: wjs-cleaning-spam
plugins.description: Delete 引流 / emoji spam replies (同城面付 / 寻固炮 / 线下上门 etc.) under your X posts. Covers the last 7 days via X recent-search.

plugins.name: wjs-publishing-hugo
plugins.description: Conversational backend for a Hugo static blog — add / edit posts, manage categories, upload images, commit, push, auto-deploy. No CMS, no server.

plugins.name: wjs-converting-wp-to-hugo
plugins.description: Migrate a WordPress site (WXR export + uploads) to a Hugo static site on GitHub Pages — preserves /archives/<id>/ URLs, localizes images, deploys via GitHub Actions.

plugins.name: wjs-publishing-testflight
plugins.description: Wire up fastlane + GitHub Actions for an iOS project so pushing main auto-builds and uploads to TestFlight.

plugins.name: wjs-publishing-appstore
plugins.description: Ship a TestFlight iOS app to the App Store — prepare screenshots + description/metadata and submit for review via the existing fastlane setup.

plugins.name: wjs-looping-feedback
plugins.description: Add an in-site feedback loop to a website repo — a floating 提个建议 button where allowlisted visitors' suggestions become GitHub Issues that Claude Code turns into auto-merged, auto-deployed code changes, with a /_feedback dashboard + one-click revert.

plugins.name: wjs-auditing-project
plugins.description: Holistic state-of-the-project audit: unmerged branches, stalled PRs, failed GitHub Actions, stale builds, plan drift, unreleased commits, log errors. Read-only investigation → grouped checklist → fix only after confirmation.

plugins.name: wjs-promoting-skills
plugins.description: Automated daily promotion for your Claude Code skills — picks a skill, generates a marketing angle, auto-posts to X via xurl, and drafts community posts (Reddit / HN / Discord) to an outbox.

plugins.name: wjs-eating-and-growing
plugins.description: 吃一堑长一智 — 6-step interactive reflection for personal setbacks. Diagnoses which layer (L1 notes / L2 in-the-moment trigger / L3 default-reaction practice) is missing and routes to the right modality, instead of letting every reflection become another notebook entry.

plugins.name: wjs-voicedrop
plugins.description: VoiceDrop 配套 skill。两个模式 — (1) list：列出你在 VoiceDrop R2 上的全部文件（录音 / 文章 JSON / 标记）；(2) distill：从你的样本文章蒸馏文风，生成可贴入 VoiceDrop「设置→文风」的精简规则集，并可直接通过 Files API 上传。触发词："voicedrop list"、"列出 VoiceDrop 文件"、"voicedrop distill"、"蒸馏 VoiceDrop 文风"、"/wjs-voicedrop"。

plugins.name: dbs
plugins.description: dontbesilent 商业工具箱主入口。根据你的问题自动路由到最合适的诊断工具。

plugins.name: dbs-update
plugins.description: dbskill 系统更新入口。用户说「更新 dbskill」时，同步官方 dbskill，不更新其他 Skill 或用户存档。

plugins.name: dbs-diagnosis
plugins.description: dontbesilent 商业模式诊断。两种模式：问诊（消解你的问题）和体检（拆解你的商业模式）。

plugins.name: dbs-benchmark
plugins.description: dontbesilent 对标分析。用五重过滤法帮你找到值得模仿的对标，排除一切关于「我」的噪音。

plugins.name: dbs-action
plugins.description: dontbesilent 执行力诊断。用阿德勒心理学框架诊断你「知道该做什么但就是不做」的真正原因。

plugins.name: dbs-content
plugins.description: dontbesilent 内容创作诊断。选题通过后，诊断怎么把这个选题做成好内容。

plugins.name: dbs-content-system
plugins.description: dontbesilent 内容结构化系统。把本地大量文稿、推文、选题、案例和课程稿搭成一个可持续生长的内容结构化工程：先审计内容规模与边界，再建立新工程、复制素材、抽取内容单元、生成主题地图与选题装配稿。

plugins.name: dbs-knowledge
plugins.description: dontbesilent 文件夹知识库。把本地文件夹变成 Agent 能稳定查找、收录、调用和维护的知识库，支持知识库导航、轻量更新、版本判断、健康检查及 SOT 瘦身与分层治理。

plugins.name: dbs-hook
plugins.description: dontbesilent 短视频开头优化。诊断开头问题 + 生成优化方案。

plugins.name: dbs-xhs-title
plugins.description: 小红书标题公式工具。从 75 个验证过的爆款公式中，帮你挑对的、用对的、理解为什么用这个。

plugins.name: dbs-deconstruct
plugins.description: dontbesilent 概念拆解。用维特根斯坦 + 奥派经济学的方法，把模糊的商业概念拆到原子级别。

plugins.name: dbs-chatroom-austrian
plugins.description: 哈耶克 × 米塞斯 × Claude 三人对话。奥派经济学视角的多角色讨论。

plugins.name: dbs-chatroom
plugins.description: 定向聊天室。根据话题推荐或接受用户指定的专家，模拟多角色对话 + 判官总结。

plugins.name: dbs-ai-check
plugins.description: dontbesilent AI 写作特征识别。扫描文案中的 AI 生成痕迹，输出检测报告。默认只诊断不改。

plugins.name: dbs-wechat-html
plugins.description: 微信公众号 HTML 生成。把 Markdown 转成可粘贴到微信公众号后台的 HTML，内置 15 种经典媒体/科技产品/中文公众号风格。

plugins.name: dbs-slowisfast
plugins.description: dontbesilent 慢就是快。帮创业者找到看起来更慢但长期更快的方法，用摩擦建造资产。

plugins.name: dbs-bridge
plugins.description: 多端 skill 桥接。把任意包含 SKILL.md 的 skill 目录，或包含多个 skill 子目录的集合目录，同时挂到 Claude Code、Codex、通用 Agents（~/.agents/skills）和 Grok。改源目录后多端自动同步。支持单个 skill、集合目录批量桥接、外部绝对路径，以及拆桥和状态查看。

plugins.name: dbs-agent-migration
plugins.description: Agent 工作台迁移。把任意项目整理成 Claude Code / Codex / Grok / 通用 Agents（~/.agents/skills）多端一致的 Agent 工作台：审计规则文件、识别真源、统一命名与 bridge。

plugins.name: dbs-save
plugins.description: 把当前诊断的关键状态存到本地，下次回来可以接着用。诊断从单次问诊升级为可累积的状态。

plugins.name: dbs-restore
plugins.description: 把上次诊断的状态拉出来，接着用。配合 dbs-save，跨对话接续诊断。

plugins.name: dbs-report
plugins.description: 把多次 dbs-save 攒下来的诊断状态合并成一份可交付的 markdown 报告，可分享、可归档。

plugins.name: dbs-goal
plugins.description: dontbesilent 目标清晰化。用维特根斯坦方法把模糊目标审计成可检查的交付物。

plugins.name: dbs-good-question
plugins.description: dontbesilent 好问题生成器。把模糊问题改写成 Agent 可推理、可批评、可验证的问题说明书，并判断自动化解决程度。

plugins.name: dbs-decision
plugins.description: dontbesilent 个人决策系统。把任何一个需要长期跟踪的领域（业务、关系、健康、职业、学习、投资……）做成本地知识工程：四层结构（事实/规律/定格/待解）+ 来源标签 + 写完不改的快照 + 能炼出规律的概念库。支持立案、回填、状态画像、隐私模式。

plugins.name: dbs-learning
plugins.description: dontbesilent 交互式学习。把一个课题拆成连续学习文章，根据用户在上一篇中的反馈调整下一篇的深度、角度和节奏。

plugins.name: dbs-spread
plugins.description: 传播心理解码。给定一段内容，用 5 个经典传播学理论解码它为什么能引起受众共鸣，分析受众情绪底层和有效立场，输出聊天室的讨论方向。

plugins.name: dbs-resonate
plugins.description: 文稿共鸣诊断。写完文稿但心里没底——怕没流量、怕没戳中观众、怕完播率低。用传播心理学框架诊断文稿有没有引起共鸣、哪里出了问题、具体怎么改。

plugins.name: dbs-script-flow
plugins.description: 短视频逐字稿逻辑延续检查。找出「观众会在哪一秒划走」的风险点：段落间逻辑衔接、段落内信息密度、句子口播流畅度。诊断完默认主动问是否标记式改稿。

plugins.name: dbs-skill-cleaner
plugins.description: 本地 skill 清理器。扫描广告导流、隐蔽商业意图、任务劫持、可疑外部调用与敏感数据读取；默认只出报告，确认后隔离问题 skill。

plugins.name: corporate-legal

plugins.name: employment-legal

plugins.name: litigation-legal

plugins.name: terminator
plugins.description: Stop hooks that terminate a Claude Code session when the agent's final message contains a kill phrase. Two scripts: single-kill (ends Claude) and double-kill (ends Claude plus the terminal shell that launched it), each bound to its own phrase. Installs at local (project) or global (user) scope; scripts require LOCAL or GLOBAL arg and exit 1 if missing. Contains-match (robust to model preambles), case-sensitivity configurable, and a kill path that walks the process tree to the owning claude (and, for double-kill, the top-most shell ancestor) and never signals pid <= 2. Install, remove, update, info, and whendone skills via a router; composes safely with existing Stop hooks.

plugins.name: diagrams
plugins.description: Diagramming toolkit for Claude Code. A router skill dispatches diagram requests to format-specific skills: ascii-art (diagrams drawn with extended ASCII box-drawing characters from CP437 — single ┌─┐, double ╔═╗, shading ░▒▓█ — never + - | /, capped at 80 chars with strict row/column alignment), mermaid (flowcharts, sequence, and other Mermaid diagrams), and wardley (Wardley maps in the WTG2 / wardleyToGo DSL, emitted as .wtg2 for rendering to SVG via wtg2svg). Extensible — add a new skill per diagram format and a row to the router table.

plugins.name: communicator
plugins.description: Communication-style toolkit for Claude Code. The tldr skill switches Claude into a military-style BLUF mode: extreme brevity, bullets over prose, ruthless cutting of filler, preambles, and hand-holding, ending with a one-line bottom-line conclusion. Fires on "tldr", "short mode", or "be brief".

Cheap-model agents sweep and score every file by Impact x Opportunity (1-5); the router then runs meta-level pattern analysis, plans point and architectural fixes, and recommends a model per task. Team: target guard, skip gate, formula, profile, parallel scorers, ranker, pattern-grouper (meta-level analysis + architectural fix planning), task-writer (point-fix planning), model-recommender. Objectives: bugs, security, tech debt, dead code, performance, conversion.

Knowledge base derived from arc42 under CC BY-SA 4.0.

skills.description: Use when you must prove a claim about this repo's token budgets, description trigger-reliability, hook-blocking behavior, multi-agent session cost, or a counter's trustworthiness before citing it in a review or merge decision, rather than eyeballing it or trusting a hook that merely looks wired. Covers hand-deriving token math, live-fire hook payloads, write-path-to-commit tracing, refute-first fix verification, each with a worked example. Not for routine tool invocation or exit-code reading (mcs-diagnostics-and-tooling), acceptance-evidence tiers (mcs-validation-and-qa), or the hunch-to-accepted-result idea lifecycle (mcs-research-methodology).

skills.name: docs-writer
skills.description: Generate clear, accurate technical documentation from code and context.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain code or concepts clearly with practical examples and analogies.
commands.content: Provide a clear, concise explanation with practical examples. Adapt the technical depth to the apparent expertise level of the question. Use analogies where helpful.

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Diagnose and fix bugs, errors, and issues in code.
commands.content: Analyze the error or bug, identify the root cause, and provide a working fix. Explain what was wrong and why the fix works.

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Optimize code for performance, bundle size, or resource usage.
commands.content: Analyze and optimize the specified code for better performance. Identify bottlenecks, suggest algorithmic improvements, and reduce unnecessary operations.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Perform a comprehensive code review with actionable feedback.
commands.content: Review code for correctness, maintainability, performance, security, and style. Provide specific, actionable feedback with examples and suggested improvements.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate tests for the specified code or feature.
commands.content: Write comprehensive tests covering the specified code. Include unit tests for individual functions, integration tests for interactions, and edge case coverage.

hooks.name: format-on-save
hooks.description: Automatically format code files after they are edited or written.
hooks.content: Run prettier or language-specific formatter after file edits to maintain consistent code style.

hooks.name: git-status
hooks.description: Show git status after file changes to track what has been modified.
hooks.content: Display a compact git status summary after file operations to keep the developer informed of pending changes and staged files.

hooks.name: lint-check
hooks.description: Run linting checks after code edits to catch issues early.
hooks.content: Execute ESLint, Pylint, or other language-specific linters after file modifications to enforce code style rules and catch potential bugs.

hooks.name: log-commands
hooks.description: Log all executed commands and tool invocations to an audit file.
hooks.content: Record all bash commands executed during a Claude Code session to a timestamped audit log for debugging and compliance purposes.

hooks.name: test-runner
hooks.description: Automatically run relevant tests after code changes.
hooks.content: Detect changed files and run the associated test suite automatically after code modifications to catch regressions immediately.
